narrative:
Precinct Salem City 2-A (precinct in Columbiana County) has 1,102 registered voters, with 67.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.7%, a modest Republican lean of 2.8 percentage points.
